message:
feat: add repro governance actions pipeline to metamorphic testing

Introduce a reproducibility governance layer that transforms
metamorphic campaign triage findings into deterministic, actionable
governance records (ReproGovernanceAction) with stable fingerprints
and automatic bead-ID generation for issue tracking integration.

Source changes:
- runner.rs: add ReproGovernanceAction and
  ReproGovernanceActionsReport types with serde support, implement
  repro_governance_actions_from_triage() with SHA-256 fingerprint
  deduplication, add write_repro_governance_actions_json() writer,
  add stable_governance_fingerprint() helper, and two new tests
  verifying stability and deduplication invariants
- run_metamorphic_suite.rs: wire --governance-actions CLI flag,
  create output directory, generate and write governance actions
  report alongside existing triage output
- proof_specialization_linkage.rs: rustfmt reformatting only

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
